relationships.context: The Lessons Review System implements a self-improving mechanism.
The system is designed based on modular architecture for efficiency.
The self-improving system leverages principle-lesson linking to create a knowledge base.
The system follows a specific pipeline for managing lessons.
The change log tracks updates related to the modular structure of principles.
